primary_variables.matched_definition: Stimulation driven by cytokines or chemokines (for example IFN, TNF, IL-family).
evidence: Healthy-derived AEC2 were treated with transforming growth factor ß1 (TGF-β1) to evaluate the plasticity of their ECM production.
TGF-β1 stimuli induced a significant change in interstitial ECM production from AEC2

primary_variables.matched_definition: Comparison between disease and matched control cohorts.
evidence: Cryopreserved type 2 AEC (AEC2) from healthy lungs and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) afflicted lungs were cultured
MS-data showed only one differing protein between the COPD and healthy group, HLA class I histocompatibility antigen coded by the gene HLA-A.

attributes.route_or_context: added to a subset of wells containing cells from healthy donors
evidence: At the medium changes day seven and ten, 2 ng/mL of recombinant human TGF-β1 (R&D systems, Minneapolis, MN, USA) was added to a subset of wells containing cells from healthy donors.
Samples for RNA sequencing and MS was collected at day seven and 13 of culture

replicate_hints: cells from two donors (healthy or COPD) were cultured in DLS from four different donors for healthy cells and three different donors for COPD cells
multiplex_channel_hints: labelling of cell derived proteins with amino acids containing stable heavy isotopes, to separate the newly produced proteins from the ECM background provided by the human lung slice
The heavy signal originates from proteins produced by the repopulating AEC2, while the light signal comes from the DLS.

evidence: MS-data showed only one differing protein between the COPD and healthy group
Healthy AEC exposed to TGF-β1 from day 7 to 13 in culture had differently expressed genes
Matrisome proteins dominate among the most upregulated proteins in response to TGF-β1
Samples for RNA sequencing and MS was collected at day seven and 13 of culture

quantification_strategy: Heavy and light label free quantification (LFQ)-intensities

base_candidates_ranked.reason: The study explicitly uses SILAC (stable isotope labelling by amino acids in cell culture) with heavy L-Lysine and L-Arginine to distinguish newly synthesized proteins from the ECM background.

The authors mention using 'label free quantification with default settings' in MaxQuant and reporting 'Heavy and light label free quantification (LFQ)-intensities', suggesting a hybrid approach where SILAC pairs are quantified as LFQ intensities.

trigger_keywords: heavy cell derived / light DLS derived
